case_title: PORTFOLIO RECORVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. FLORENCE R. TAMBOUR et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2); WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECORVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECORVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED APR-25-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAMBOUR, FLORENCE R.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECORVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TAMBOUR, FLORENCE R. DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-21-2013

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECORVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAMBOUR, FLORENCE R. $4,917.85 PRINCIPAL, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,153.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TAMBOUR, FLORENCE R.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
DECLARATION RE: 1. REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT [CCP 585] 2. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS [EVID 1550] 3. INTEREST WAIVED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECORVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECORVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED AUG-12-2013, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT TAMBOUR, FLORENCE R.
